error.teacher_advice_en: The calculation of compound interest is incorrect. It should also consider the interest generated from the interest of the previous year. The correct formula is P(1+r/n)^(n*t), where P is the principal, r is the annual interest rate, n is the number of times interest is compounded per year, and t is the number of years of investment or loan. The correct calculation should be 6000*(1+10%)^2.
